svg:
<svg id="003-data-hierarchy" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="数据层次关系" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">数据层次关系</text><text class="text small" x="24" y="64">数据对象中包含数据元素，数据元素由数据项组成。</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="112" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a1</text><text class="text tiny" x="112" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 0</text><rect class="box" x="154" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="196" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a2</text><text class="text tiny" x="196" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 1</text><rect class="box" x="238" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="280" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a3</text><text class="text tiny" x="280" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 2</text><rect class="box" x="322" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="364" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a4</text><text class="text tiny" x="364" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 3</text><rect class="box" x="406" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="448" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a5</text><text class="text tiny" x="448" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 4</text><rect class="box" x="490" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="532" y="139" text-anchor="middle">...</text><text class="text tiny" x="532" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 5</text><rect class="accent pulse" x="70" y="81" width="36" height="8" rx="4"/><text class="text small" x="24" y="222">连续单元表示物理地址相邻，访问时按元素大小跳转。</text></svg>

<svg id="003-structure-object" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="数据对象与数据结构" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">数据对象与数据结构</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">数据对象</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">同性质元素</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">不强调关系</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">数据结构</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">元素集合</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">强调关系</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>

<svg id="003-three-elements" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="数据结构三要素" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">数据结构三要素</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">三要素</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">逻辑结构</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">存储结构</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="213">数据运算</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">学习问题</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">关系是什么</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">怎样存储</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="213">怎样操作</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>

<svg id="003-storage-types" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="四种存储结构" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">四种存储结构</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">顺序/链式</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">物理相邻</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">指针连接</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="213">索引表</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">索引/散列</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">按关键字定位</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">额外空间</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="213">快速查找</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>

<svg id="003-adt" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="ADT 抽象边界" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">ADT 抽象边界</text><rect class="box pulse" x="30" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="105" y="143" text-anchor="middle">开始</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 188 137 H 205"/><rect class="box" x="213" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="288" y="143" text-anchor="middle">先定义逻辑和运算</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 371 137 H 388"/><rect class="box" x="396" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="471" y="143" text-anchor="middle">再选择存储实现</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 554 137 H 571"/><rect class="box" x="579" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="654" y="143" text-anchor="middle">结束</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="205" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="210">动画高亮表示处理步骤正在推进</text></svg>
